steps.title: Identify the experimental action
steps.content: Grant's team is taking sterile soil and introducing live microbes into it—stocking the medium with organisms to test their effects on plants.

steps.title: Match this action to the verb
steps.content:
”Populated” precisely means “filled with organisms” or “stocked with,” exactly describing the action of introducing microbial slurries into soil.

The other choices—”precluded” (prevented), “estimated” (calculated), and “sanitized” (sterilized)—describe unrelated or contradictory actions.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
